HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF PARIS L. VIGIL).

APPEARANCES: Paris Vigil, 925/518-3881 defendant; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION FOR CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. Order signed after hearing. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Continued To Apr-11-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. Appearances: Paris Vigil (925.518.3881) defendant and responding party. No other appearances. The court continued the matter to April 11, 2011 for defendant to file and serve supplemental evidence of retirement benefits. Order signed after hearing. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
